Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for domain accounts with access to web applications integrated with Active Directory Federation Service (AD FS)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Password bruteforcing attempts for account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} via AD FS on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {count.subevents}.
Successful password bruteforcing for account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} via AD FS on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {count.subevents}.
